raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>XXXX  I notified Citi Group of a transaction that was not authorized from XXXX XXXX After this I requested a new card to prevent new transactions. After getting my first new card, another transaction of {$520.00} happened on XX/XX/year>, so I contacted their support and they suggested a slightly different process in a " lost or stolen card '' scenario, which I did. Then later that same month, another transaction {$2000.00} was approved on the exact same account. So, I requested yet another credit card. That was 3 different new cards and still the transactions kept coming through and they continued to approve them stating that I am responsible. I am currently at a grand total of {$3000.00}. 

Below is a copy of the first dispute details. 
Dispute Details Case ID XXXX Reason for Dispute Goods/ services not as expected Card details Card ending in - XXXX
